dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The world ended. Not with a bang, but with a whimper. And then, a scream.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Humanity, once proud masters of Earth, became playthings for beings beyond comprehension. The Gods, the Outer Gods, the Celestials... they watched, judged, and ultimately, destroyed.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Yuwon
dialogue.line: (thought) I remember the screams. The fire. The despair.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Yuwon
dialogue.line: (thought) I remember fighting. Failing. Watching everything turn to ash.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Standing before the colossal gate, a structure that had appeared overnight, Kim Yuwon felt the familiar chill of the past. The Tower. The very place that promised salvation, yet delivered damnation.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Yuwon
dialogue.line: (thought) This time, it will be different.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Yuwon
dialogue.line: (thought) I won't just survive. I will conquer. I will change the future.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He stepped through the gate, the world shimmering around him. The familiar sterile white room, the floating blue screens, the sense of being watched.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: Welcome, Challenger. This is the First Floor of the Tower.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: Your first trial: Eliminate all Goblins within the designated area. Time Limit: 30 minutes. Reward: 100 points, Basic Skill Scroll (Random). Failure: Death.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Yuwon
dialogue.line: (thought) Goblins. Always Goblins for the first floor. A classic.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Around him, other challengers materialized. Fear, confusion, and a desperate resolve etched on their faces. Most were young, naive, thrust into a nightmare they couldn't comprehend.

dialogue.speaker: Challenger 1
dialogue.line: G-Goblins? What is this place?!

dialogue.speaker: Challenger 2
dialogue.line: Is this a dream? A game?

dialogue.speaker: Challenger 3
dialogue.line: No, look! That thing!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GROWL

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: From the shadows of the forest ahead, small, green-skinned creatures with crude weapons emerged. Their eyes glowed with malice.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Yuwon
dialogue.line: (thought) Panic. It's always the first enemy.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Yuwon didn't panic. He didn't even flinch. He'd faced far worse. He'd died to far worse.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Yuwon
dialogue.line: (thought) The first floor is always a test of resolve, not strength. But I need to move quickly. Every second counts.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He reached into his inventory, a feature the system hadn't even bothered to explain yet, and pulled out a simple, well-balanced short sword. It hummed faintly in his hand.

dialogue.speaker: Challenger 4
dialogue.line: H-He has a weapon!

dialogue.speaker: Challenger 5
dialogue.line: Where did he get that?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SHRIEK

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A goblin charged, its rusty dagger glinting.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Yuwon
dialogue.line: (thought) Too slow. Too predictable.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SWISH

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SPLAT

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Before the goblin could even register a threat, Yuwon moved. A blur of motion, the short sword arcing with deadly precision. The goblin's head separated from its body with a wet thud.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: Challenger 'Kim Yuwon' has eliminated a Goblin. +1 Point.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The other challengers froze, their eyes wide with a mixture of horror and awe. This wasn't a game. This was real. And this man... he was different.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Yuwon
dialogue.line: (thought) One down. Many more to go. I can't waste time on these small fries.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He didn't wait for the others. He didn't offer advice. He simply moved, a silent, deadly hunter entering the fray.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLANG

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THRUST

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GURGLE

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Goblins fell, one after another, their crude weapons no match for Yuwon's practiced movements. He wasn't just fighting; he was executing.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Yuwon
dialogue.line: (thought) The 'Basic Skill Scroll' is important. I need to get a good one. Something that will give me an edge in the early stages.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Yuwon
dialogue.line: (thought) And the points... I need to maximize them. Every single point will count later.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He pushed deeper into the forest, ignoring the cries of the other challengers as they struggled against their own attackers. Their fate was not his concern. Not yet.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: His eyes scanned the environment, searching not just for enemies, but for anything out of place. Any hidden paths, any anomalies. His past life had taught him that the Tower always hid secrets, even on the first floor.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RUSTLE

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He spotted a faint glow behind a thick bush, almost imperceptible. Most would miss it, focused on survival.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Yuwon
dialogue.line: (thought) There it is. The hidden quest.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A smirk, cold and determined, touched his lips. This was why he was here. To exploit every advantage, to rewrite every outcome.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Yuwon
dialogue.line: (thought) Let the games begin. Again.

summary: Kim Yuwon, a regressor burdened by the past destruction of humanity, re-enters the Tower to prevent Ragnarok. He begins his first trial, easily dispatching goblins while other challengers panic, and immediately seeks out a hidden quest using his foreknowledge.
